---
title: "r params$title"
author: "r params$author"
date: "r Sys.Date()"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: hide
params:
  seurat_obj: NULL
  comp_group: "comparison"
  author: "Pipeline"
  out_dir: "."
---

```r {r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
```  

```r {r load-obj}
obj <- params$seurat_obj
if(is.null(obj)) stop("No Seurat object provided")
group <- params$comp_group
out_dir <- params$out_dir
```  

# QC Report: r group

## Summary of the dataset

```r {r summary}
total_cells <- ncol(obj)
total_genes <- nrow(obj)
cells_by_sample <- table(obj$orig.ident)
cells_by_condition <- table(obj$condition)
```  

| Metric                | Value                 |
|-----------------------|-----------------------|
| **Total cells**       | r total_cells       |
| **Total genes**       | r total_genes       |
| **Samples**           | r length(unique(obj$orig.ident)) |
| **Conditions**        | r length(unique(obj$condition)) |

**Cells per sample:**
```r {r cells-by-sample, results='asis'}
kable(as.data.frame(cells_by_sample), col.names = c("Sample", "Number of cells"))
```   

**Cells per condition:**
```r {r cells-by-condition, results='asis'}
kable(as.data.frame(cells_by_condition), col.names = c("Condition", "Number of cells"))
```  

## Filtering history

The pipeline applied the following filters to each sample before merging:

- Min features: r ifelse(exists("cfg"), cfg$qc$min_features, "?")
- Max features: r ifelse(exists("cfg"), cfg$qc$max_features, "?")
- Max counts: r ifelse(exists("cfg"), cfg$qc$max_counts, "?")
- Max mitochondrial percent: r ifelse(exists("cfg"), cfg$qc$max_mt_percent, "?")
- Gene removal pattern: r ifelse(exists("cfg"), cfg$species$gene_removal_pattern, "?")

Doublet removal using scDblFinder. The numbers of doublets removed per sample are stored in QC/Doublet_Removed_*.txt.

## QC metrics after filtering

```r {r qc-violin}
p1 <- VlnPlot(obj, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), 
              ncol = 3, pt.size = 0.1)
print(p1)
```   

```r {r qc-scatter}
p2 <- FeatureScatter(obj, feature1 = "nCount_RNA", feature2 = "percent.mt")
p3 <- FeatureScatter(obj, feature1 = "nCount_RNA", feature2 = "nFeature_RNA")
(p2 + p3)
``` 

## Doublet detection

```r {r doublets}
if("scDblFinder.class" %in% colnames(obj[[]])) {
  dtab <- table(obj$scDblFinder.class)
  kable(as.data.frame(dtab), col.names = c("Class", "Number of cells"))
} else {
  cat("No doublet classification found in the object. (Doublets were removed before merging; see per-sample doublet stats in QC folder.)\n")
}
```  

## Cell cycle and sex scoring (if applied)

```r {r scoring}
if("S.Score" %in% colnames(obj[[]])) {
  cat("**Cell cycle scores**\n")
  print(table(obj$Phase))
}
if("Assigned_Sex" %in% colnames(obj[[]])) {
  cat("**Sex assignment**\n")
  print(table(obj$Assigned_Sex))
}
```  

## Clustering overview

Number of clusters: ```r length(unique(obj$seurat_clusters)) ```

```r {r umap, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
DimPlot(obj, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE) +
  ggtitle(paste("UMAP -", group))
```   

## Session info

```r {r session}
sessionInfo()
```
